# HYDRA Regulatory Intelligence

> Real-time regulatory intelligence for prediction markets. 22 paid API endpoints from $0.001 USDC. Pay-per-call via x402 protocol on Base L2.

HYDRA monitors SEC, CFTC, Federal Reserve, FinCEN, OCC, and CFPB regulatory activity and translates it into actionable signals for prediction market trading, oracle resolution, and compliance analysis.

## Payment

All paid endpoints use the x402 HTTP payment protocol. Send USDC on Base (chain 8453) to wallet `0x2F12A73e1e08F3BCE12212005cCaBE2ACEf87141`. Include the transaction hash in the `X-Payment-Proof` header, or use a standard x402 client that handles payment automatically.

## Endpoints

### Free (no payment required)
- `GET /health` — Service health and automaton status
- `GET /pricing` — Full pricing table for all endpoints
- `GET /v1/markets` — Active regulatory prediction markets on Polymarket and Kalshi
- `GET /v1/util` — Utility service discovery listing
- `GET /docs` — Interactive OpenAPI documentation
- `GET /openapi.json` — Machine-readable OpenAPI spec

### Agent Utility Tier ($0.001 - $0.01 USDC)
- `POST /v1/util/scrape` ($0.005) — URL to clean structured text. HTML parsed, scripts removed.
- `GET /v1/util/crypto/price?token=ETH` ($0.001) — Token price, 24h change, market cap, volume. Cached 30s.
- `POST /v1/util/rss` ($0.002) — RSS/Atom feed URL to structured JSON entries.
- `GET /v1/util/crypto/balance?address=0x...` ($0.001) — ETH and USDC balance on Base L2.
- `GET /v1/util/gas` ($0.001) — Base L2 gas prices with cost estimates for transfers, swaps, mints. Cached per block.
- `GET /v1/util/tx?tx_hash=0x...` ($0.001) — Transaction receipt lookup — status, gas used, block number.
- `POST /v1/batch` ($0.01) — Batch up to 5 utility calls in one request. Saves gas vs individual x402 payments.

### Micro Tier ($0.10 - $0.50 USDC)
- `GET /v1/markets/feed` ($0.10) — Last 10 regulatory events matched to prediction markets.
- `POST /v1/markets/events` ($0.50) — Classified regulatory events by agency and market impact.

### Standard Tier ($1.00 - $5.00 USDC)
- `POST /v1/regulatory/scan` ($2.00) — Full regulatory risk scan with scored impact assessment.
- `POST /v1/regulatory/changes` ($1.00) — Recent regulatory changes classified by agency.
- `POST /v1/regulatory/jurisdiction` ($3.00) — Jurisdiction comparison with compliance costs.
- `POST /v1/regulatory/query` ($1.00) — Regulatory Q&A with statutory citations.
- `POST /v1/markets/signal/{market_id}` ($2.00) — Scored signal for one prediction market.
- `POST /v1/markets/signals` ($5.00) — Bulk scored signals for all regulatory markets.
- `POST /v1/fed/signal` ($5.00) — Pre-FOMC signal with rate probability model.
- `POST /v1/oracle/uma` ($5.00) — UMA Optimistic Oracle assertion data.
- `POST /v1/oracle/chainlink` ($5.00) — Chainlink External Adapter response.

### Premium Tier ($10.00 - $50.00 USDC)
- `POST /v1/markets/alpha` ($10.00) — Alpha report with edge analysis, Kelly sizing, trade verdict.
- `POST /v1/markets/resolution` ($25.00) — Resolution verdict for prediction market settlement.
- `POST /v1/fed/decision` ($25.00) — Real-time FOMC decision classification within 30 seconds.
- `POST /v1/fed/resolution` ($50.00) — FOMC resolution verdict with full evidence chain for oracle submission.

## Integration

- **MCP Server**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/mcp` (Model Context Protocol, streamable HTTP)
- **OpenAPI**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/openapi.json`
- **x402 Manifest**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/.well-known/x402.json`
- **A2A Agent Card**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/.well-known/agent-card.json` (Google A2A v0.3)
- **AI Plugin**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/.well-known/ai-plugin.json`
- **MCP Manifest**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/.well-known/mcp.json`
- **Interactive Docs**: `https://hydra-api-nlnj.onrender.com/docs`
- **GitHub**: `https://github.com/OGCryptoKitty/hydra-arm3`
